page.label: Eat & Drink
page.title: Our Menu
page.intro: American bar and grill favorites with a twist. Vegetarian and gluten-free options available — ask your server for specifics.
page.note: Ask your server for pricing, availability, and dietary details.
page.disclaimer: Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions. Our gluten free items are prepared in a common kitchen; exposure to flour is possible. Our gluten free items are not recommended for guests with Celiac or any other gluten sensitive disorder.
page.hookahNote: Premium flavors — ask your server for today's selection.
